description.zh: 在用户发送消息时，把时间、电量、天气、位置、当前屏幕应用、应用使用时长、屏幕文本、通知、记忆等信息作为显性附件注入，并提供工具箱设置界面与菜单开关。
description.en: Inject time, battery, weather, location, current screen app, app usage duration, screen text, notifications, memories, and other info as visible attachments when the user sends a message, with both a toolbox settings screen and menu toggle.
